description: The Avengers travel through time to collect the Infinity Stones, creating multiple branch timelines. 2012 Loki escapes with the Tesseract, triggering the TVA's attention.
Sylvie kills He Who Remains at the Citadel at the End of Time, shattering the Sacred Timeline and unleashing infinite multiverse branches.
Loki sacrifices himself to hold the multiverse together, replacing He Who Remains as the guardian of all timelines at the center of the temporal loom.
Doctor Strange casts a spell to make the world forget Peter Parker is Spider-Man, but it fractures the multiverse barrier, pulling in variants from other universes.
Wanda Maximoff destroys Mount Wundagore and every copy of the Darkhold across the multiverse, collapsing the Darkhold's influence on all realities.
In an alternate timeline, Peggy Carter takes the Super Soldier Serum instead of Steve Rogers, becoming Captain Carter and altering the course of World War II.
Deadpool and Wolverine travel through the Void and the TVA, ultimately merging elements of the Fox X-Men universe into the Sacred Timeline.

event_name: Kang's Exile in the Quantum Realm
description: Kang the Conqueror is exiled to the Quantum Realm by his variants, setting up the Council of Kangs and the Multiverse War.
